e4c6d7c84760b411.text:
Dear Lisa, 

I'm really sorry you have been feeling so anxious about this major career change and also unsure about your marriage and what the future will look like. I know it is a lot to carry at once, and I want you to know that it is normal to feel lost when life is shifting in many directions at the same time.

Your life means a lot to me, and I hope you can be patient with yourself. You do not have to have every answer today. Maybe we can get coffee and take a long walk like we used to, just to breathe and talk without pressure. We can go hiking or walking in the nature if that helps you clear your mind.

Thank you for trusting me with your heart. Things will become clearer soon.

Have a nice day and see you soon!

With warmth and love,

1b4961453af197a0.text:
Hi Fred,
I would just like to take a moment to say how sorry I am about the death of your mum. She was, of course, a very supportive and encouraging person, and I know how much she meant to you and the family.

This was really painful to hear because I remember the good memories of her, especially how loving she was and how she always made people feel welcomed. I know this because I saw it myself many times, and she had that gentle way of making people feel stronger than they were. he heart was full of kindness.

So please accept my condolences, mate, it is much felt by us both as people of faith. I believe she will rest in peace with the Angles and that God will comfort you.

From,
X.

7846c43c3b528adc.text:
My lovely friend, Pedro. Today, I have decided to write this to you. Not only to thank you, but also to take this opportunity to appreciate you for being the best friend I could ever ask for. For 20 years, you have stood by me, and I want you to know that I can't trade you for anything.

The surprise birthday party you hosted for me overwhelmed me with so much joy. I could not believe that you did such a thing for me, especially because I had never had anyone do something like that before. You made me feel loved, remembered and important. I pray that God blesses you for the happiness you brought to my heart.

Never ever forget that I value you deeply. Take good care of yourself, my friend. Always know that you will always have a special place in my heart.

a4ebfd9b20523d4c.text:
Hey friend I know I hurt you when I told our friend about your cousin cheating and I want to say I am really sorry for the tension my actions caused. I know what I did felt like betrayal on your side and I understand why you are upset, but my intention wasn't to betray you. I was trying to be honest and protect a friend, even if I did it in a way that hurt you.

You have every right to feel disappointed but I want to remind you that I value our relationship so much. I have made mistakes and I am here noticing the damage it caused. Please know that I want to build trust again no matter what whether you need time, space or a proper talk. I love you so much and I believe we can get through this if you allow me the chance.

386ebd43b7e8b48f.text:
My childhood friend. I am so happy to write to you, my friend. We have been friends since we were small, and we have grown together through weekends, after school games and all our silly memories. Having you by my side in those days was amazing and I enjoyed every single moment.

I still remember our secret handshake and how serious we were about it like it was a real promise. I remember us playing together after school, dancing and singing like we were famous people. You always loved music and I loved how we could make fun out of nothing.

I miss you a lot and I hope we can have a catchup session soon. I want to hear everything about your life now. Always know that I love you and I will always have your back no matter what.

2454b8dc2b649dce.text:
Hello my friend,

I am so happy to write to you because I have been thinking about reconnecting with you for a long time. How are you doing, how is work and how is your family. I also want to know if you still enjoy your hobbies like before because those small things made you happy.

On my side, life has been moving slowly but surely. I am working hard and trying to build myself, even though sometimes things are not easy. I have learnt that friend make time for each other, so when you receive this message just know I will be waiting for you to call or text me.

You have a space in my heart that no one can occupy in my life. I hope we can talk like we used to do when we were kids, because the memories can help us reconnect again.

3add34dc647715a3.text:

3140d4046f1bc7af.text:
I am still trying to understand how I found out about the passing. I was at home when the message came through and for a few minutes I just sat there staring at my phone. I could not believe it. Death can be so cruel because it comes and takes people we still needed, people we still had plans with and conversations we thought we would continue later.

I keep thinking about last Christmas and all the memories we made then. We laughed so much, shared food, took pictures and spoke like we had all the time in the world. Those moments feel even more special now because none of us knew it would be the last Christmas together.

I know healing from death is not easy my friend. Some days will hurt more than others, but I hope you allow yourself to cry, to remember and to slowly move forward. I am here with you.

Dear Laura,

aaab47bbd8e0d79e.text:
When I look at you today I see someone curated and fortified by time, like good meat and wine. That is not just a compliment, it is an observation earned by years of watching you become more yourself. You are somehow ever young and bright, but increasingly wise, which is annoying because it gives you even more authority when you pretend to know everything.

I have seen your worst, the impatience, the stubbornness, the dramatic silences, the selective memory when my trespasses are involved. But strangely, all of that only enhances your best. It makes your kindness feel chosen, your humour feel sharper and your joy feel like something you fought for.

May you forever be this happy and full of life. May age soften you where it should, strengthen you where it must, and most importantly, make you forget all the things I still owe you apologies for.

8ac8c159cf8c5a07.text:
My sweet friend

Words cannot describe how much I have been thinking about you lately, and how strongly I felt the need to write this letter. I can clearly remember the old times we shared, the laughter, the long talks and the small moments that, at the time, felt ordinary; but have now become memories I hold so dearly.

You were always someone with warmth, patience and a rare kind of strength. Those qualities have impacted my life in ways I did not fully understand before. You taught me that kindness can be quiet, that loyalty can survive distance and that friendship, when true, gives us courage to continue even when life changes.

Now, as I move forward in life, I carry those lessons with me. I hope we can reconnect, not only to remember what was, but to build something meaningful again, just as we have before.

Hello my friend!

I'm writing because I know losing your job has been heavy on you and I wanted you to know i truly understand how scary that can feel. I have been in that kind of situation before, where everything feels uncertain and you start questioning yourself, but please don't let this moment make you forget who you are.

Darling!

e156e63a44c4f8cf.text:
Dear Mia, 
I’m so thankful you rushed over when my little brother got food poisoning on our camping trip. My heart was racing, and I didn’t know what to do.

You showed up with a whole care kit like you had packed for a tiny hospital. Ginger ale, medicine, wipes, and his favorite fuzzy blanket tucked under your arm. He looked so small and scared in that sleeping bag, but the second he saw that blanket, his face softened.

I still can’t believe you cleaned up the tent without complaining once. It was gross, and I know it was gross, but you just rolled up your sleeves and said, “We’ll fix it.” That stayed with me.

The trip won’t be remembered only for the mess. I’ll remember you sitting beside him, making quiet jokes until he smiled.

I know how much effort that took. I’m here whenever you need me too.
Love you,

77e44b1bac951f3a.text:
My dear grandfather

Words cannot describe how immeasurably blessed I feel today, standing here as we celebrate your 90th birthday. I can clearly remember being a child, running around your yard while you called me back with that gentle but firm voice, teaching me that joy and discipline can live together. You would tell stories that made us laugh, and then somehow end them with a lesson we carried for years.

Now, many years later, I can truly say I respect you deeply. You have shown us patience, wisdom, strength and unwavering love. You have been a guide to this family, not only through words, but through the way you live each day.

In your golden years, you still bring warmth and joy to everyone around you. May this day remind you how loved, honoured and cherished you are.

84b4a3c32f63a59b.text:
Hello dear friend!

I hope you are doing great. I know I messed up and I want to say I am truly sorry for not keeping my promise to attend your graduation ceremony. I know that day was very important to you and I should have been there cheering, clapping and probably shouting too loud to embarrass you... laughs.

What happened was that we had an emergency at work because a deadline was pushed forward suddenly, and I could not leave without creating more problems for the team. Still, that does not change the fact that I disappointed you. I should have communicated better and earlier.

Please know that I will make it up to you in a major way, regardless of the ask. Congratulations on your graduation, I am so proud of you and I wish you accomplishments, opportunities, blessings and breakthroughs. Cheers!!

5fdf5c6814f076a0.text:
From the first day we became friends, I knew you were someone I would always miss when you are not around. your laughter, your stories and the way you make even ordinary days feel special has stayed with me. I miss being around you so much, and some days I wish I could just walk to your place and sit with you like before.

I want you to know that I am a winner now. I am doing very well at my new place, and I am proud of the woman I am becoming. Things are not always easy, but I am standing tall and making progress.

Every time I go to the park, I miss you even more. It reminds me of our walks, our jokes, and those small moments that made life lighter. I hope we meet soon. stay blessed.

b6a64cd0aec064b5.text:
im writing this vow to show how much i love you, and how thankful i am that you are in my life. we have shared special moments together, moments that made me believe that love can really be patient and kind. we have came a long way, through good days and hard days, but we are still standing here together.

i promise to love you, cherish you and always make sure you know that you are important to me. i will support you in everything you do, and i will choose you even on days when life is not easy. Hopefully we will grow old together, laugh about the things we survived and remember how far we came.

just in short, i really love you so much, and i will never stop being grateful for you. always know that my heart is with you.

27414b49bf0f4e0f.text:
How are you doing old friend. It has been a long time no see, and I hope you are doing well wherever life has taken you. Something happened the other day and it reminded me of you. I saw someone playing the same song we used to play when we thought we had no worries, and for a moment I felt like we were back there laughing at things that were not even funny.

I also wanted to tell you that I got that dream job we always talked about. You remember how much I wanted it and how many times I doubted myself. It finally happened, and I wished you were there so I could tell you in person.

I hope life has been good to you and your family. We should meet soon and catch up properly because we have truly lost time.

8bbcaf10900e56c5.text:
I am saddened that our conversation has brought pain between us, and also ashamed because my intentions were good but the result was not. I thought that being a friend meant I had to be honest with you at all times, but reflecting on it now, I see that I spoke without enough care and ignored how my words would land in your heart.

Life teaches us many lessons through conversation, and this one has taught me that truth without kindness can still wound a person. I admit I was wrong to think only about what I wanted to say, and not about what you needed to hear.

Kindly accept my apology my friend. I belive that if there is still respect and love between us, we shall meat again in understanding. I will do better and speak with more compassion.

213266be62124352.text:
Hello my dear friend, I'm happy to write this appreciation to you today. Some humans can help but they will not, just for the fun of it, but you came through for me with a selfless and nice heart. You ignited hope in my heart again and for that I will appreciate you always.

57094b1a7ada5e6a.text:
Ted!

What a man he was - our local greengrocer, our unofficial town noticeboard, and the only person who could sell you carrots while remembering your auntie's bad knee and your son's exam results... all in the same breath.

Ted served local families for years, and he knew everyone by name. Not in that fake shopkeeper way either; he really knew you. He would ask after people, remember birthdays, and somehow know when you needed an extra apple slipped into the bag.

One of my favourite memories is him quietly donating boxes of fruit and veg to the homeless shelter. No fuss, no speech, just Ted doing Ted things.

He leaves behind dear Margaret, 92, and a whole street that will feel a bit less colourful without him. Hope they have a decent market stall up there, mate.

Love you, Ted.

3d028c1598b94ce8.text:
Hey.

I am so sorry for your loss. I know there is nothing I can say that makes this less awful, but I wanted you to know I am holding space for you. When my dad passed away, your dad showed up to the funeral and had us laughing so hard we were crying, telling all those stories about what they got into when they were younger. I never told him how much that meant to me, and I really wish I had.

Everytime I ran into him, he bragged about how great you were doing. He was so proud of you, like annoyingly proud in the best way. I will also never forget your mom handing us pots and pans to wake him up when he had passed out from drinking too much and she was just over it.

Hold onto the good memories, ok? I love you.

52419375140483d3.text:
Dear Friend

I am writing this message to apologize deeply about what happened. I am really sorry that you had to find out from someone else how I expressed my concern about how you went about doing things. That was not right at all. I should have come to you from the very beginning and spoken to you directly like a true friend.

Please find a place in your heart to forgive me. I am truly sorry.

A regretful friend

11133433b3f474f1.text:
Dear John,
I’m so happy we are here, in this little backyard, saying I do. My heart feels full. I keep thinking about that rainy coffee shop five years ago, when you walked in with wet hair and a shy smile. I didn’t know then that you would become my home.

You still make me laugh in the smallest ways. Like when you dance in the kitchen while waiting for toast, moving like the music picked a fight with you. Those moments are simple, but they are ours, and I love them.

I promise to hold your hand through every storm and every sunny day. I promise to listen, to laugh, to be gentle, and to stay. I can’t wait for all the ordinary mornings and big adventures ahead.

I love you, John. Always.

Know that you are in my thoughts and prayers in this difficult time. I am here for you and your family.

Dear friend,

I'm really grateful for the beautiful surprise you left at my door. Finding that set of Eckhart Tolle's The Power of Now books was such a thoughtful gesture, and it brightened my day more than you probably realise. It arrived at exactly the right moment, when I needed something quiet and steady.

Our friendship means a lot to me, and your gift reminded me of our calm connection, the kind that does not need too many words to feel close. I have already started reading the books with gratitude and a little more peace in my heart. They bring me a sense of calm, like a long walk in the nature after a difficult week.

Thank you for thinking of me and for showing up in such a gentle way.

Have a nice day and see you soon!

With warmth and love,

7fb8cd10fc4650b3.text:
Hi all,
I would just like to take a moment to speak about my friend Matthew, and to say how much he meant to us. Matthew was, of course, a loving husband and father to Emily and Rebecca, and I know they were the centre of his world.

He was always looking on the bright side of life- even when things were difficult. This was really important to those around him because his optimism encouraged others. I know this because I have seen him lift a whole room with a joke, or just by listening properly.

Matthew was also a stalwart of the local Church, raising money through charity work and fund raising. The Sunday School children loved him especially, for his humour and compassion.

So thanks, mate, for the kindness, faith and warmth you gave us. It is much appreciated by us all.
From,
A friend.

I am so sorry to share this with you but I know I hurt you and I cannot pretend like nothing happened. I did not mean to kiss your crush. I know how bad that sounds, and I know seeing or hearing about it must have felt like a betrayal from someone you trusted.

That night we were all talking and laughing, and he kept saying things that made the moment feel confusing. I had also been drinking and I was caught up in the attention, but that is not an excuse. He leaned closer, I did not move away, and the kiss happened. I should have stopped it before it went that far.

You are my friend and I value what we have more than any silly moment. Please forgive me and allow me the opportunity to regain your trust. I miss you so much my friend.

Que hay papi lechudo. I just watched a couple of movies that immediately pulled me back to when we were young, when everything felt smaller, easier, less weighed down by bills, distance and whatever strange sadness adulthood brings. We were so nimble then, physically and emotionally, jumping from one stupid plan to another with that fearless belief that the world could not really touch us.

Comedy still reminds me of you. Not because every joke was good, but because with you even the dumbest thing became legendary. The shenanigans, the running around, the laughing until our stomachs hurt, it all had this bright, reckless innocence to it.

I hope you are doing great financially, emotionally, spiritually, all of it. I hope life has given you the happiness and sense of belonging you gave me without even knowing it. I miss those talks, that ease, that version of us.

89333eaeb90a4590.text:
My beloved mom

Words cannot describe how immeasurably broken I am today to be standing here, saying goodbye to you. I can clearly remember the days of my youth, watching you carry the weight of being a single mother with courage, love and a strength I did not fully understand then. You gave me your very best, even when life gave you very little to work with.

You had a zest for life that filled every room. You laughed loudly, loved deeply and faced each chapter with a kind of grace that shaped me into the young woman I am today. Now, as I stand here, I know I am made from your sacrifices, your lessons and your beautiful spirit.

As I continue this journey, may the love you gave me, give me strength and unwavering fortitude, for the future. I will carry you always.

2b0525ab9658394d.text:
Hello my friend!

I'm so sorry to hear about the passing of your dad. I know there are no perfect words for a loss like this, especially when it is a parent, but please accept my genuine and heartfelt condolences. I know your heart is heavy, and i hope you know you don't have to carry this grief alone.

Your dad was such a warm person. I remember how he used to make us laugh with those serious stories that somehow ended in jokes, and how he always offered food even when we said we were full. He had that way of making everyone feel welcome, like family, and not forget his advice that always came with a smile.

I know you have so many memories with him, and I hope they comfort you. I'm here for you, to talk, cry or just sit. Sending love and strength. Cheers to his beautiful life!!

You are a very special soul, and I feel lucky to have you in my life. I am sorry for hurting you. I hope you can forgive me with time. stay blessed.

1242e32643bfdd6b.text:
im writing this letter to say that i know i was wrong and i take full responsibility for my actions. i made a mistake and i dont want to run away from it or pretend like it was small, because i know it hurt you. i should have handled things better and i should have thought before doing what i did.

what happened was that i allowed my feelings and frustration to control me, and instead of speaking properly i acted in a way that was not fair to you. Hopefully you understand that im not saying this to excuse myself, but to explain what was going on. i was wrong and i know that clearly.

i promise to change and do things different in the future. just in short, i am really sorry, hopefully you will find it in your heart to forgive me.

0b68b00a2246edbb.text:
I did not recognize how fast time was moving until today, seeing you turning 30 and standing here as a fine young man. You have grown with strength, discipline and so much character, and everyone who knows you can see that you are truly loved.

You have always wanted to appear strong, but what makes you special is not only strength, it is the heart you carry for people around you. You bring family and friends together, you make people laugh, and you remind us how to enjoy life and have some fun. That is why today is not just your birthday, it is a celebration of the person you have become.

Go out there and show the world what you've got. Chase your dreams, protect your peace and keep becoming greater. I feel proud because we are truly celebrating a gem. Happy 30th birthday.

ce117c59e98c40c5.text:
I am saddened and happy at the same time to stand here with you today. Saddened because words cannot express how I really feel after all the storms we have passed, and happy because through most of those storms we still found our way back to love. Together, we have shared great moments, hard days and stories to be treasured for the rest of my days.

Life was not always easy for us, but we made the best of what we had. We hustle, dream and plan together. We do not harm nor illtreat anyone, but truly, this is gangster love, the kind that stands firm when tomorrow is not certain.

I promise to love you with honesty, to build with you and to protect what we have. If there is life after every struggle, I belive we shall always meat again in love.

d8611345a798974b.text:
Hello my good friend, I'm happy to write you after such a long time. The memory of our young days still lives on, and sometimes I sit and laugh alone when I remember how we behaved back then. School days were funny, lots of dreams, lots of noise, and zero worries about tomorrow.

I heard you got your dream job and honestly I'm SUPER EXCITED FOR YOU. You worked really hard for it and deserved it way long. I can beat my chest on that one because I know the kind of person you are.

Been a while, and a good number of our schoolmate back then lives in my city now, we often meet up and talk about old times. It will be beautiful if you join us one day. Dear friend, don't throw old friendship away when we can still enjoy good memories.

Cheers to this good moment

480aa960d7b8892e.text:
My love, I know today can feel overwhelming and you might feel like many eyes are on us, but please know that my heart is sure. Today infront of the priest and everyone present here, I want to promise you that only death will separate us.

With this ring, i promise to love you and take care of you through thick and thin. I know marriage will need focus, patience and hard work, but I know we got this, because we have been waiting for this and building towards this future together.

I love you with all my heart. Please do dont ever doubt that I will be here for you. If you need anything, just shout, I am here for you. This is the beginning of our future, so let us go there and show them what our love is made of. I choose you today and always.

e8c60b61504cdcd1.text:
Annie!

Happy 26th birthday - look at you, still causing chaos, looking ridiculous, and somehow making all of it seem classy. Another classic year executed by the most unapologetic woman I know!

I love that you take pride in your work, whether you're modelling, filming, or generally making everyone else look like they are putting in half the effort. You never apologise for being yourself, and honestly... that's one of the best things about you.

Obviously, our origin story is not exactly one for the church newsletter. You were in a relationship, I was pretending to be sensible, and then somehow we ended up here. TBH, not our cleanest bit of admin, but definitely my favourite bad decision.

Hope tonight is full of drinks, laughs, and no awkward follow-up e-mails. First one is on me.

Love you, birthday girl.

722d5b6c5d355bd2.text:
Hey.

Thank you so much for thinking of me. I know that probably sounds simple, but it really does mean a lot to me. Since my dad passed, the holidays have been really hard, and I have been trying to get through them without falling apart every five minutes. Then your gift showed up and somehow made the day a bit brighter.

It is something the boys and I will cherish for years to come. I had to explain to them why I was crying and snotty over a UPS package, which was not exactly my finest parenting moment, but it was also kind of perfect. You made me feel seen in a time where I have felt really alone.

You have no idea how much it means that you remembered me and my dad in that way. Please don't stop being you, ok? I love you.

f36707bb78cf6379.text:
My apologies, I am truly sorry. Wow, I am full of emotions because I realise that I spoke without thinking, and my words ended up hurts you. That was not my intention, but I can see now how careless I was.

You were standing there with your heart open, and instead of choosing quietness, steady and full of grace, I allowed my mouth to run ahead of my mind. I should have been satisfied to listen first, because words can build but they can also destroy peace.

I know much will change if I do not learn from this point forward. Life requires sacrifice, and friendship also requires patience. Do not be discourage about us, because I am willing to do better and speak with love next time.

I love and respect you. Please forgive me. Love is peace and beautiful.

97056ad51ade7f93.text: I'm sorry for what I did and I want to take responsibility to my action because I know I hurt you and it was not good at all I know saying I'm sorry cannot remove what happened but I want you to know that I really feel bad and I appreciate you for still being present even when I made things difficult for you. What I did was wrong and I will not justify my behavior but I want to explain that I acted without thinking proper and I let my feelings control me in that moment which was not fair to you. Times flies so fast, and one moment we were all having fun and the next moment Gary lost himself in the night - so scary! I still think about what could happend if you were not there to help him and make sure he was safe.

Dear Friend

Thank you so much for always going above and beyond for me without asking. I hope everything is going well on your side. Friend you have shown me what a true friend is, and for that I will cherish our bond forever and always. Oh yes your friend sees everything, even when I do not always say it out loud.

my love, today as i stand before you . I remember how we met and what drew me to you from the beginning, your kindness, your smile and the way you made ordinary days feel peaceful. cba65e8cae8412c6.text:
Dear Lena,
I’m so happy we’re here for your 25th birthday. My heart feels full looking at you. I can’t stop thinking about that first day in 6th grade art class when we both flicked our brushes too hard and somehow got paint on the ceiling. Everyone else panicked, but you laughed so hard that even the teacher had to smile. That laugh is still one of my favorite sounds.

You’ve always had the biggest heart. You make people feel special, even when they are trying to hide in the corner. Like when you drag me to karaoke, knowing I’m scared to sing, and then you stand beside me like we’re selling out an arena.

I hope this year brings you all the joy you give other people. The world feels brighter with you in it.

Love you,
Your best friend

He is always in my thoughts and prayers. I pray for him and for your family. I am here for you, and I believe his memory will last forever.

2dd030cd7a9a5941.text:
Dear Saray, 

I'm really sorry about the loss of your mother. I know how much she meant to you, and I can't imagine how heavy everything feels right now. Losing someone who made home feel like home is such a deep pain.

I keep thinking about her gentle voice and how she always made everyone feel welcome. Even when we only came by for a short visit, she would somehow make tea, ask if we had eaten, and make the room feel warmer. She had that quiet kindness that stayed with people long after they left.

Her warmth will continue to live in the hearts she touched, especially yours. I know nothing can make this easy, but I'm here for you - maybe for coffee, a walk, or just sitting in silence.

Have a nice day and know you are loved.

With warmth and love,
Lisa

a09e920cadbb941a.text:
Hi Jennifer,
I would just like to take a moment to say I am so sorry about my behaviour in that Italian restaurant last night. I am, of course, referring to me shouting at you when you were only trying to be supportive. It was unfair and completely out of order.

I thought you had dismissed my worries about my job and I thought you were being insincere, but I can see now that I was under a lot of stress and pressure and just lost it. I was a bit off my head, and that is no excuse for making you feel attacked.

Your friendship means the world to me and I really value it. Please forgive me! I will do anything to get us back on an even keel- dinner, coffee, a proper talk, whatever helps.

From,
X.

ee2e1a815d4e17a1.text:
My lovely son, Thando. Today, I have decided to write this to you. Not only to apologise, but also to take this opportunity to remind you how much I love you. I know I promised to buy you the PlayStation 5 for your birthday, and I know how much you were looking forward to it. Things did not go according to how I had planned them, and for that I am deeply sorry.

You have been so patient and respectful, even when I know you were disappointed. I want you to know that I can't trade you for anything, even in the next life, I'll still want you to be my son. I will try my best to make it possible for your next birthday, God willing.

Take good care of yourself, my love. Always know that you will always be my baby, no matter how old you might be.

You were laughing at yourself the whole time and that says a lot about the kind of person you are.

You have such a good heart, you make much progress in life and even when things get tough, you don't give up. I'm so proud of you and the way you care for people around you. Better days and bigger blessings are coming and you'll get through every new chapter with courage.

So please everyone raise your glasses, let's celebrate with love and joy. I love you so much.

My best friend. I am truly sorry for what happened, my friend. We have been friends for so long, and we have grown together, and that is why it hurts me that things escalated the way they did. I did not mean for it to go that far, but I know that saying that does not remove the hurt I caused.

Having you by my side has been amazing and I have enjoyed every single moment of our friendship. I am sorry for my part and I take responsibility for not handling things better. You have always been someone I value, and I don't want this mistake to destroy what we have built.
